title: Xu Fei(Xuan Dao Sect)
content:
Xu Fei
 was an Inner Sect Disciple of the 
Heng Yue Sect
. She joined the 
Xuan Dao Sect
 after it defeated the Heng Yue Sect and took over its mountain.

Contents

1

Personality

2

History

2.1

Book One

2.2

Book Two

2.3

Book Ten

Personality
[
]

She had a crush on 
Wang Zhou
 and shared his dislike of Wang Lin as a result in her teen years. As an adult, she is friendly, allowing a junior brother who cannot fly to cling to her.

History
[
]

Book One
[
]

She appears any time 
Wang Zhou
 is present to chime in on his mockery towards 
Wang Lin
, as a result of the love triangle between her, Wang Zhou and 
Zhou Rui
, whose attention he vies for. She chooses to stay and join 
Xuan Dao Sect
 after they take Heng Yue Mountain.

S1 EP4 Donghua first

Book Two
[
]

A few years after the Heng Yue Sect was disbanded, she and her senior disciple-brother 
Li Hai
 stumbled upon Wang Lin's cultivation cave by mistake. Wang Lin recognized her and allowed her to leave unharmed.

Book Ten
[
]

Wang Lin has a dream involving her and Zhou Rui after he consumes three Dao Fruits to complete his Life and Death, Karma and True and False Essences. He encounters them in a boat in the rain.
